title: Cricket: Reserve league action
description: CRICKET NEWS - Hartenbos and George B will...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Hartenbos and George B will contest for the reserve league division 1 title on Saturday following victories in the semi-finals the past weekend.

Hartenbos defeated Western Hope by 16 runs while George B won by 28 runs against Union Stars B.

The division 1 final will be played at the REC Ground on Saturday and the reserve league division 2 semi-finals will also be played this weekend.


> Summarised scorecards


Division 1 semi-finals

Hartenbos beat Western Hope by 16 runs:

Hartenbos 193 all out (41.4 overs) ((Durant Lucas 52, Franco du Plessis 21, Warren Wooley 20, Gurzwin Meyer 3/20, Godroy Overberg 3/52, Lesley Maksella 2/36).

Western Hope 177 all out (38 overs) (Lesley Maksella 45, Josh Karelse 49, Vian Yong 5/58, Liam van der Merwe 3/36).

George B beat Union Stars B by 28 runs:

George B 188 all out (42.1 overs) (Leon Marais 72, PJ Carstens 32*, Daylin Williams 3/34, Ducayne Plaatjies 2/34, Lastio Williams 2/48).

Union Stars B 160 all out (34.3 overs) (Ducayne Plaatjies 69, Wildre Hano Wessels 30, Shannon Opperman 28*, Tyrique Wessels 21, PJ Carstens 3/36, Leroy Nortje 3/39, Etienne van der Merwe 2/22, Boeta Oosthuizen 2/23).


> Fixtures for the coming weekend:


Reserve league division 1 final

Hartenbos A vs George B (REC Ground)

Reserve division 2 semi-final

Plettenberg Bay Pioneers B vs Sussex B

Beaufort West vs Knysna Cavaliers B

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
